creator: ngharibyan@arm.synisys.com
text:
1. Enter in single user mode
2. mount fs as R/W (mount /dev/ad2s /)
3. init c
4. init q

you already have a fatal error of init, but now you are in login screen. try to login

6. enter u/n p/w
7. wait a little bit or type init
Init is already running..

Panic
(Where are you going without my init)

Autorebooting

It is all
I make install Freebsd 6.2 releng and do cvsup till 6.3

Regards,
Narek Gharibyan
Network Administration Team leader
Synergy International Systems /Armenia

How-To-Repeat: Every time
